decisions.description: Evaluates whether the Account's RecordType.Name contains "Household". Yes → Set_Household_Checkbox (Is_Household__c = true). No (default) → Clear_Household_Checkbox (Is_Household__c = false). RecordType.Name will be null if no record type is assigned; the null path falls through to the default (clears the checkbox), which is the safe outcome for non-typed Accounts.
decisions.name: Is_Household_Record_Type
decisions.label: Is Household Record Type?

Flow.description: Before Save trigger on Account (create and update). Enforces coupling between the Household record type and the Is_Household__c checkbox so the two fields are never out of sync. Entry filter fires only when RecordTypeId is changing (ISCHANGED on update, or ISNEW AND a record type is assigned on create). When RecordType.Name contains "Household", sets Is_Household__c = true; otherwise sets it to false. In-memory field assignment — no additional DML issued.
Flow.label: SMQS Household Setup IsHousehold Enforcement

recordUpdates.description: In-memory assignment — sets Is_Household__c = false on $Record when RecordType.Name does not contain "Household" or is null. Reached via the default path of Is_Household_Record_Type. Terminal — no successor element. Before Save; no DML issued.
recordUpdates.name: Clear_Household_Checkbox
recordUpdates.label: Clear Household Checkbox

recordUpdates.description: In-memory assignment — sets Is_Household__c = true on $Record when RecordType.Name contains "Household". Reached via Yes_Household_RT branch of Is_Household_Record_Type. Terminal — no successor element. Before Save; no DML issued.
recordUpdates.name: Set_Household_Checkbox
recordUpdates.label: Set Household Checkbox
